creator: tj+freebsd_bugs@a13.fr
text:
(In reply to Steve Wills from comment #2)
> Committed, thanks!

Thank you a lot! I'm very happy that I can now install it very simply
with pkg, and will now recommend this way for potential FreeBSD users
of this program.

I hesitated with making a "non-rubygems" port (without `USES=gem')
like `www/gist' or `x11-wm/subtle' ports. But I don't have yet an
official distribution outside of rubygems, maybe later and I would
submit a new port (or patch for this one), but it won't be before at
least a few months. In the mean time I'm already happy with this
simple port as rubygem.


Thanks again!
